title: On Iran’s Border, Cooking Oil Trade Is a Snapshot of the Country’s Struggles
summary_full: The war has exacerbated Iran’s economic crisis, forcing many to cross the border into Turkey to buy the most basic goods.
summary_public: The war has exacerbated Iran’s economic crisis, forcing many to cross the border into Turkey to buy the most basic goods.
